CMake toolchain files for various architectures and microcontrollers, including ARMv7l, i686, STM32F3, STM32F4, and MIPS.


## Files
- **[toolchain_external.cmake](toolchain_external.cmake.md)**: Configures an external toolchain for CMake with specified compiler settings.
- **[toolchain_linux_armv7l-el.cmake](toolchain_linux_armv7l-el.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain file for building on Linux with ARMv7l architecture using GCC.
- **[toolchain_linux_armv7l.cmake](toolchain_linux_armv7l.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain file for building on Linux ARMv7l with specific compiler and architecture flags.
- **[toolchain_linux_i686.cmake](toolchain_linux_i686.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain file for configuring Linux i686 architecture with specific SSE flags.
- **[toolchain_mcu_stm32f3.cmake](toolchain_mcu_stm32f3.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain file for configuring STM32F3 microcontroller with ARM GCC compiler.
- **[toolchain_mcu_stm32f4.cmake](toolchain_mcu_stm32f4.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain configuration for STM32F4 microcontroller using arm-none-eabi-gcc.
- **[toolchain_openwrt_mips.cmake](toolchain_openwrt_mips.cmake.md)**: CMake toolchain file for building with OpenWrt on MIPS architecture using mipsel-openwrt-linux-gcc.
